3.anchor: Don’t let anyone deceive you in any way, for that day will not come until the rebellion occurs and the man of lawlessness

13.anchor: But we ought always to thank God for you, brothers and sisters loved by the Lord, because God chose you as firstfruits
13.note: Some manuscripts because from the beginning God chose you

15.anchor: So then, brothers and sisters, stand firm and hold fast to the teachings

3.anchor: We ought always to thank God for you, brothers and sisters,
3.note: The Greek word for brothers and sisters

12.anchor: We pray this so that the name of our Lord Jesus may be glorified in you, and you in him, according to the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.
12.note: Or God and Lord, Jesus Christ

6.anchor: In the name of the Lord Jesus Christ, we command you, brothers and sisters, to keep away from every believer who is idle and disruptive and does not live according to the teaching
